title: Tick/L2 CSV ingestion contract + loader (pre-data executable)
source: Split of epic B0162 per methodology survey (docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-11-l2-microstructure-methodology-survey.md)
why: Jun-15 data drop must be plug-and-validate. Survey pitfalls define the contract: monotonic ts, dedupe, drop crossed/locked quotes (broker aggregation produces bid>=ask), ex-ante missing-depth-level rule, tz-aware UTC, graceful degradation to L1, volume-is-tick-count detection/labeling.
scope: Define schema dataclass + validator mirroring pipeline/data.py rigor for tick + 5-level book CSVs.
Loader -> tidy frame (trades + book snapshots); synthetic fixture generator for tests (no real data needed pre-Jun-15).
Day-one report script: measured spread distribution per instrument (replaces survey's unverified cost table), depth-level liveness, volume field semantics, timestamp granularity/clock checks.
recommendation: Build NOW against synthetic fixtures so Jun 15 is validation, not development.
